case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORP. ON 9/7/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED."

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,132.89 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORPORATION ( REGISTERED OWNER ) KAUFMAN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-15-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, DAVID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-10-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORPORATION ( REGISTERED OWNER )
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORPORATION ( REGISTERED OWNER )
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10-31-16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-FORWARD TIME EXPIRED."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORPORATION ( REGISTERED OWNER )
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2016 - CONTINUED TO OCT-31-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NEITHER PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO NOR DEFENDANT HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORPORATION WERE WILLING TO HAVE THIS MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, GRACE M. GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARIE LAM, INDEPENDENT ADJUSTER FOR HERTZ EQUIPMENT RENTAL CORPORATION. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAVID KAUFMAN. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
